message:
feat: BD_NAME env var for multi-instance help text identity

Wrapper scripts can set BD_NAME to override "bd" in help output,
so `BD_NAME=ops bd --help` shows "ops" throughout. Pairs with
BEADS_DIR for full multi-instance support without symlinks or
config files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
